news.t: SpaceX trading hits ‘bonkers' levels as a wave of new ETFs see a massive cash influx
Ten SpaceX ETFs Launch as SPCX Hits Market
These SpaceX Funds Are for Active—and Brave—Traders Only

overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long SpaceX Daily ETF (SPAL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Space Exploration Technologies Corp, (NASDAQ: SPCX) stock. SPAL was launched on Jun 15, 2026 and is issued by GraniteShares.

data.title: SpaceX trading hits ‘bonkers' levels as a wave of new ETFs see a massive cash influx
data.text: Newly launched leveraged ETFs are seeing heavy inflows as investors look for fresh ways to play the SpaceX hype.

data.title: These SpaceX Funds Are for Active—and Brave—Traders Only
data.text: SpaceX will be risky enough. But new ETFs that give leveraged exposure to the stock on the long or short side are on the way.
